message.content:
@startuml
participant "Administrative" as Admin
participant ":AddScooterUI" as AddScooterUI
participant ":AddScooterController" as AddScooterController
participant ":Pharmacy" as Pharmacy
participant ":ListScooters" as ListScooters
participant "scdb:ScooterDB" as scdb:ScooterDB
participant "batdb:BatteryDB" as batdb:BatteryDB

participant "sc:Scooter" as sc:Scooter
participant "bat:Battery" as bat:Battery

Admin ..> AddScooterUI :begins the process of adding a scooter
AddScooterUI ..> AddScooterUI :asks for the necessary data(id_Scooter, qrCode, status, id_Battery, capacity)

AddScooterUI ..> Admin :inserts the solicited data

AddScooterUI ..> AddScooterController :newScooter(id_Scooter, qrCode, status, id_Battery, capacity)
AddScooterController ..> AddScooterController :newScooter(id_Scooter, qrCode, status, id_Battery, capacity)
AddScooterController ..> AddScooterController :create(id_Scooter, qrCode, status, id_Battery, capacity)
AddScooterController ..> sc:Scooter :create(id_Scooter, qrCode, status, id_Battery, capacity)
AddScooterController ..> sc:Scooter :create(id_Scooter, qrCode, status, id_Battery, capacity)
AddScooterController ..> bat:Battery :create(id_Battery, capacity)
AddScooterController ..> bat:Battery :create(id_Battery, capacity)
AddScooterController ..> bat:Battery :validateBattery(bat)

AddScooterController ..> ListScooters :validateScooter(sc)
ListScooters ..> ListScooters :validateScooter(sc)
ListScooters ..> ListScooters :addScooter(sc)
ListScooters ..> sc:Scooter :save(sc)
ListScooters ..> bat:Battery :save(bat)

AddScooterUI ..> AddScooterController :registerScooter()
AddScooterController ..> AddScooterController :registerScooter(sc)
AddScooterController ..> ListScooters :registerScooter(sc)
ListScooters ..> ListScooters :validateScooter(sc)
ListScooters ..> ListScooters :addScooter(sc)
ListScooters ..> sc:Scooter :save(sc)
ListScooters ..> bat:Battery :save(bat)

Admin ..> AddScooterUI :confirms
AddScooterUI ..> Admin :validates the data, presents it and asks the administrator for its confirmation
Admin ..> AddScooterUI :adds the scooter to a list of scooters

@enduml
